choices.text: ERC-2612 permit: user signs approval off-chain → DEX submits permit + transferFrom in one tx. Inherit ERC20Permit from OpenZeppelin. Eliminates pre-approve step.
ERC-721A (Azuki) defers per-token storage until first transfer. 5 NFTs at ~1.5× single mint gas vs. 5× with OpenZeppelin. Standard for 10k+ collections.
ERC-1155: one contract holds fungible + semi-fungible + NFTs. Batch ops 16× cheaper. setApprovalForAll covers all token IDs. Standard for games (inventory + currency + equipment).
Merkle root: 10k addresses stored as single bytes32 on-chain. Users submit proof + leaf. MerkleProof.verify gates mint. Off-chain compute; minimal on-chain storage.

questions.explanation: Merkle root + proofs for O(1) on-chain allowlist.

choices.text: OpenZeppelin AccessControl: bytes32 ROLE = keccak256("X_ROLE"); onlyRole(ROLE) modifier; _grantRole + _revokeRole. Multiple distinct roles per address. Or v5 AccessManager for centralized policy.
